title: From #general
headline: A note on how we work — and a standard I want us to hold as we become an AI-nati...
quote: A note on how we work — and a standard I want us to hold as we become an AI-native company. Our entire AI strategy rests on one shared, queryable intelligence layer: a single place where our people and our agents can ask “what do we know about X, and why did we decide it?” and get a grounded, cited
author: Pavel Golubev
